shortDescription: Internal bookkeeping for the virtual company — track expenses, revenues, invoices, and burn rate without external accounting SaaS
orchestratorUseCases: record a new expense, revenue event, invoice, or transfer
list recent expenses or revenue events with optional filters by type, category, status, or date range
get a financial summary showing total expenses, revenues, and net balance for a time period
update the status of an invoice from pending to paid or cancelled
useWhen: user wants to track or record a business expense or cost
user wants to log a revenue event or payment received
user wants to create or track an invoice
user wants a financial summary, burn rate, or net balance report
user asks about bookkeeping, ledger, or financial records
avoidWhen: user asks about live Azure cloud costs (use budget_get_status instead)
user asks about token or API usage (use budget_estimate_tokens instead)
user needs a full accounting or ERP system

tools.name: ledger_record_entry
tools.description: Records a new financial event in the virtual company ledger. Use for expenses, revenue events, invoices, or transfers. Returns the generated entry ID for future reference.

entryType.description: Type of financial event. Use 'expense' for costs, 'revenue' for income received, 'invoice' for billed work awaiting payment, 'transfer' for internal fund movements.

amount.description: Monetary amount (positive number). For expenses this is a cost; for revenue this is income.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. Defaults to USD.

date.description: Date of the event in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today if omitted.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this event represents (max 500 chars).

category.description: Optional category label for grouping (e.g. 'hosting', 'tooling', 'consulting', 'saas-subscription'). Defaults to 'general'.

status.description: Status of this entry. Defaults to 'confirmed' for expenses/revenues, 'pending' for invoices.

referenceId.description: Optional ID linking this entry to another (e.g. linking a payment to an invoice).

tools.name: ledger_list_entries
tools.description: Lists ledger entries with optional filters. Returns a formatted summary of matching entries. Use to review recent expenses, outstanding invoices, or revenue events.

entryType.description: Filter by entry type. Omit to return all types.

fromDate.description: Filter entries on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

toDate.description: Filter entries on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return (1-100). Defaults to 20.

tools.name: ledger_get_summary
tools.description: Returns an aggregated financial summary: total expenses, total revenues, net balance, and entry counts. Use for burn rate analysis, profit/loss checks, or owner reporting.

period.description: Time period for the summary. Defaults to 'all-time'.

tools.name: ledger_update_entry_status
tools.description: Updates the status of an existing ledger entry. Use to mark invoices as paid, confirm draft entries, or cancel pending events.

entryId.description: The ID of the ledger entry to update (returned by ledger_record_entry).

entryType.description: The type of the entry to update (required for Cosmos partition lookup).
